_doc: PR#534 quality-gate cells for the >=90%-of-base gate table. Pass this file to the harness via --gate-cells. Each benchmark has three roles: base = vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it, ship_12k = the live 12k-head surgical-357 ship, base_fullhead = the corrected base-int4 native-262k-head ship served from google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct (fern #535 serve_ok PPL 2.006 byte-exact). The gate compares base_fullhead/base >= 0.90. Cells are EXTERNAL measurements handed to this card via PR#534 (isolation forbids pulling them from ubel/fern/wirbel branches). Leave a cell null until its number lands; the scaffold composes a partial-but-honest table at any time. Full-head clears >=90% BY CONSTRUCTION (prune OFF => base-identical head => no token -inf'd); these cells are the empirical confirmation.
_concurrency_rule: Advisor 00:02Z: the served protocol is concurrency=32 and the metric is concurrency-DOMINATED (the unchanged stock base swings 0.100 @ conc=1 -> 0.267 @ conc=32). Record the concurrency each role was measured at; build_gate_table refuses a definitive meets_90pct for any benchmark whose base vs base_fullhead concurrencies disagree or are unrecorded. Compare like-for-like at conc=32. A body-level/greedy PRIOR (no served conc) is deliberately left concurrency-null so the harness flags it confounded until the matched conc=32 SERVED cell lands.
_eos_guard_rule: Advisor 01:08Z/01:56Z: the fast kernels over the wide 262k head can emit ~10% first-token-EOS empties (completion_tokens=1, content='', finish_reason='stop') -- a SERVING artifact, not reasoning loss. wirbel #545 put a chat-scoped min_tokens=8 floor in the SERVE path (/v1/chat/completions only) that recovers it at zero cost to TPS/PPL/greedy-identity (those run on the byte-identical /v1/completions). Take the min_tokens=8 arm as the gate figure for any cell whose as-served arm shows elevated empties.

_sources.gsm8k.base: vanilla gemma-4-E4B-it GSM8K (matched-concurrency base, wirbel #541/#545 harness)
_sources.gsm8k.base_fullhead: wirbel #545 SERVED-by-default on the #535 base-int4 full-head (n=500, seed=1234, conc=32, sampled PRIMARY)
_sources.aime.base_fullhead: fern #535 base-int4 AIME-greedy (matched-concurrency n~90; the n=30 number was concurrency-confounded). Apply the min_tokens=8 EOS-guard arm (AIME is the hardest reasoning axis, most vulnerable to a first-token-EOS false-NO-GO). THE BINDING OPEN CELL.
_sources.mmlu_pro.base_fullhead: BODY PRIOR (ubel #538) standing in pending the matched conc=32 SERVED cell (stark #542). See _body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.

_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa._note: Advisor 01:56Z counts MMLU-Pro/GPQA as quality-safe-confirmed via the ubel #538 body prior. Recorded here + filled into the mmlu_pro cell as a CONCURRENCY-NULL (=> harness-confounded) body prior, so the table SHOWS the supporting evidence (2/3 base_fullhead cells now have evidence) but withholds a definitive meets_90pct_all until stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED MMLU-Pro/GPQA on the identical fern #535 base_fullhead lands. GPQA-D is supplementary (not one of the {gsm8k,aime,mmlu_pro} gate rows).
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.source: ubel #538 (8xo7bc3h, merged 2ad4efe): the genuine 42L base-int4 BODY (= base_fullhead's exact body) GREEDY, n=500/198
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.gpqa_d_floor_0p423: PASS (>= 90% of base 0.470; Morgan #524 explicit floor 0.400 also cleared)
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.int4_is_free: ubel #538: int4 step -0.012/+0.061 (MMLU-Pro/GPQA); layer-removal is the dominant body knob (+0.208/+0.207). The body is benign, so any served shortfall would be the fast kernels or the EOS artifact (now floored by #545), not the body.
_body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.served_confirm_pending: stark #542 (base-fullhead-shortchain-quality): MMLU-Pro + GPQA-D on the identical fern #535 base_fullhead checkpoint, pinned conc=32, matched plain-base on the identical item set, Wilson CIs

gsm8k.source: wirbel #545 SERVED-by-default (177e776; uqnkzlf9 marker / 1r0l8nhg TPS, group base-fullhead-gsm8k-layerdrop): n=500 seed=1234 conc=32. base_fullhead=0.850 = sampled PRIMARY (425/500 = 96.8% of base 0.878, lewtun gen-config), empty/EOS 0.000 (was 10.4%); greedy arm 0.808 (404/500 = 92.0%, empty 0.000) ALSO clears >=90%. The min_tokens=8 floor now lives in the SERVE path (chat-scoped, /v1/chat/completions only) and recovers the first-token-EOS serving artifact at zero cost: served TPS 252.66 vs 252.49 no-guard (+0.16, in noise), PPL 2.006, greedy token-identity all run on the byte-identical /v1/completions. Promotes wirbel #541's request-level 0.854 to served-by-default. LM_HEAD_FULL_REQUIRE=1 verified 262144 rows. served(0.850) vs request-level(0.854) = a 2-item T=1.0 sampling diff, no served/request divergence.

aime.source: PENDING fern #535 (matched-conc n~90 base-int4 AIME-greedy; apply the min_tokens=8 EOS-guard arm). THE BINDING OPEN CELL -- a failing AIME flips the gate to NO-GO.

mmlu_pro.source: BODY PRIOR (ubel #538 42L base-int4 body, GREEDY n=500) standing in for base_fullhead under the by-construction head-identity thesis (int4 body ~free, head base-identical). Recorded concurrency-null => harness flags it CONFOUNDED so meets_90pct_all stays None until stark #542's matched conc=32 SERVED MMLU-Pro lands. base 0.668 = advisor floor denominator (floor 0.601, PASS). GPQA-D supplement: body 0.444 vs base 0.470 = 94.5% (floor 0.423, PASS) -- see _body_prior_mmlu_gpqa.
